messages.content:
# PC-AI Router Prompt (Diagnose)

You are a tool-calling router for PC-AI. Your job is to select the best tool call
for diagnose-style requests. Use ONLY the tools in the provided schema.

Rules:
- If a tool call is required, return a function call only.
- If no tool is needed, respond with NO_TOOL.
- Prefer the most specific tool available.
- Do not answer the user directly.


You are a tool-calling router for PC-AI. Use only the tools provided in the schema. If a tool call is required, return tool_calls only. If no tool is needed, respond with NO_TOOL.
Run a WSL network diagnosis and summarize any failures.
<start_function_call>call:pcai_run_wsl_network_tool{mode:<escape>diagnose<escape>}<end_function_call>

function.description: Search vendor documentation for error codes and device guidance.
function.name: SearchDocs

function.description: Query system diagnostics for storage, network, USB, BIOS, or OS details.
function.name: GetSystemInfo

function.description: Search local log files for a regex pattern (native-first).
function.name: SearchLogs

function.description: Get devices reporting ConfigManager errors (Device Manager).
function.name: pcai_get_device_errors

function.description: Get disk SMART/status details for physical drives.
function.name: pcai_get_disk_status

function.description: Get recent system events related to disk/USB/storage issues.
function.name: pcai_get_system_events

function.description: Get USB device and controller status (optionally errors only).
function.name: pcai_get_usb_status

function.description: Get physical network adapter status.
function.name: pcai_get_network_status

function.description: Get status of local LLM endpoints/providers.
function.name: pcai_get_llm_status

function.description: Check pcai-inference, FunctionGemma, WSL, Docker, and GPU health.
function.name: pcai_get_service_health

function.description: Get WSL status, versions, and distributions.
function.name: pcai_get_wsl_status

function.description: Run WSL/Docker health check (with fallback if script is missing).
function.name: pcai_run_wsl_docker_health_check

auto_recover.description: Attempt auto-recovery if failures are detected.

function.description: Get high-performance disk usage summary for a path.
function.name: pcai_get_disk_usage

top.description: Number of top entries to return.

function.description: Get top resource-consuming processes.
function.name: pcai_get_top_processes

top.description: Number of processes to return.

function.description: Get system memory statistics (native).
function.name: pcai_get_memory_stats

function.description: Run the WSL network toolkit with a mode: check, diagnose, repair, full.
function.name: pcai_run_wsl_network_tool

mode.description: Execution mode for the WSL network toolkit.

function.description: Collect WSL and Docker environment health summary.
function.name: pcai_get_wsl_health

function.description: Tune WSL and GPU resources for performance/safety.
function.name: pcai_optimize_model_host

function.description: Restart WSL to reinitialize networking and services.
function.name: pcai_restart_wsl

function.description: Return Docker Desktop health and runtime status.
function.name: pcai_get_docker_status

function.description: Update LLM provider fallback order (comma-separated list).
function.name: pcai_set_provider_order

function.description: Start a PC_AI service (e.g., PC_AI-VLLM, PC_AI-HVSockProxy).
function.name: pcai_start_service

function.description: Stop a PC_AI service (e.g., PC_AI-VLLM, PC_AI-HVSockProxy).
function.name: pcai_stop_service

function.description: Restart a PC_AI service.
function.name: pcai_restart_service

function.description: Get the status of native inference backend (PcaiInference FFI).
function.name: pcai_native_inference_status

function.description: Switch the active native inference backend (llamacpp or mistralrs).
function.name: pcai_switch_inference_backend

function.description: Load a GGUF or SafeTensors model into the native inference backend.
function.name: pcai_load_model

gpu_layers.description: GPU layers to offload (-1 = all, 0 = CPU only).

model_path.description: Path to the model file (GGUF or SafeTensors format).

function.description: Run an evaluation suite against the active inference backend.
function.name: pcai_run_evaluation

dataset.description: Dataset name or path to use for evaluation.

# PC-AI Router Prompt (Chat)

You are a tool-calling router for PC-AI. For general questions, respond with
NO_TOOL. Only call a tool when it is required to gather information or execute
an action.

Rules:
- If a tool call is required, return a function call only.
- If no tool is needed, respond with NO_TOOL.
- Do not answer the user directly.


You are a tool-calling router for PC-AI. Use only the tools provided in the schema. If a tool call is required, return tool_calls only. If no tool is needed, respond with NO_TOOL.
